verbGlossary.AGGREGATED INTO: {source}s are combined into a federated assembly for multi-trade coordination and review
verbGlossary.COMPOSED OF: {target} is made up of discrete model elements, each representing a physical building component with geometry and data
verbGlossary.GENERATES: {source} or detection process produces a downstream artifact such as a drawing, {target}, or report
verbGlossary.EXTENDS INTO: {target} is enriched with an additional dimension (time or cost) to create a 4D or 5D model variant
verbGlossary.EVOLVES INTO: {source} is progressively updated with as-built field data to become the final {target}
verbGlossary.ANALYZED BY: {target} is run through automated clash detection software to identify spatial conflicts between disciplines
verbGlossary.REVIEWED IN: {target} or set of coordination issues is examined and discussed during a BIM coordination meeting
verbGlossary.LINKED TO: {target} is associated with schedule data to enable 4D construction sequence visualization
verbGlossary.RESOLVED IN: {target} or clash is discussed and closed out during a BIM coordination meeting
verbGlossary.UPDATES: Decisions made in a coordination meeting drive changes back into {target} or discipline models
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source}of {target} element is controlled by its assigned Level of Development specification
verbGlossary.CARRIES: {target} element holds non-geometric property data (manufacturer, fire rating, performance specs) as attached parameters
verbGlossary.EXTRACTED FOR: {target} element geometry and type data are pulled out of the model to produce quantity takeoffs for estimating
verbGlossary.TESTED IN: {target} elements from different disciplines are checked for spatial conflicts during automated clash detection runs
verbGlossary.GATES RELIABILITY OF: {source} specification determines whether quantity takeoff data extracted from {target} is trustworthy at a given phase
verbGlossary.DEFINES COMPLETENESS OF: {source} specification dictates which {target} properties and parameters must be populated at each project milestone
verbGlossary.GATES EXTRACTION OF: {source} specification determines whether {target} is mature enough to produce reliable model-based drawings
verbGlossary.FEEDS: {source} data flows into {target} to drive quantity-based estimating and cost visualization
verbGlossary.INFORMS: {source} data provides as-built geometry that is used to update or verify {target}
verbGlossary.COMPARED AGAINST: {source} of field conditions is overlaid on {target} to identify deviations and verify installation accuracy
verbGlossary.CALIBRATES: {target} or scan data grounds a digital twin in verified spatial reality rather than design-intent geometry
verbGlossary.SUPPLEMENTS: {source}documentation method provides additional coverage or perspective alongside another capture method
verbGlossary.TRANSITIONS INTO: {source} becomes the geometric and data foundation for a living digital twin during facility handover
verbGlossary.FINALIZES: {source} locks {target} properties to their verified installed values during closeout
verbGlossary.MEASURED BY: {source}is quantified by an associated standard metric that tracks its volume, rate, or effectiveness
verbGlossary.CONSUMES: A digital twin ingests {target} property data to power operational analytics, maintenance scheduling, and space management
verbGlossary.REFERENCES: {target} reads model properties such as material type and assembly data to associate unit costs with elements
verbGlossary.DERIVED FROM: {target}-based drawings are extracted as 2D views from the federated 3D model environment
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS REVISION OF: {source} resolution requires updates to affected {target}-based drawings to reflect the design change
